goals.title: Add resumable long-task subagent sessions
goals.description: Design and implement opt-in persistent or forked child sessions, explicit resume semantics, bounded retention, crash-safe cleanup, and tests for tasks that cannot fit comfortably in one ephemeral child run.

goals.title: Add advanced isolated orchestration only when justified
goals.description: After measuring real usage, evaluate background lifecycle/status, strictly allowlisted nested read-only delegation, and git-worktree isolation for parallel writers without expanding the default subagent tool surface.

goals.title: Benchmark pi-minimal-subagents against cut-down pi-subagents
goals.description: Use /Users/max/pi-minimal-subagents as the candidate and the restored three-agent npm:pi-subagents configuration as the baseline. Run matched scout, reviewer/web, and worker tasks with the same models and repository; compare tool-schema and prompt overhead, latency, tokens/cost, output quality, cancellation, concurrency, and write safety. Record reproducible commands and results before deciding whether to switch user settings or publish 0.1.0.
